expectations.text: States the requirement accurately: multifactor authentication for local and network access to privileged accounts, and network access to non-privileged accounts (IA.L2-3.5.3)
expectations.evidence: 'Requirement Statement | Use multifactor authentication (MFA) for local and network access to privileged accounts and for network access to non-privileged accounts.'

expectations.text: Describes implementation per named component: Entra ID MFA (conditional access) for M365 GCC High, Duo for VPN, and explicitly addresses the on-prem AD legacy CAD workstations — the local-access-to-privileged-accounts gap most environments miss
expectations.evidence: Response covers 'Microsoft 365 GCC High / Entra ID... required to complete MFA via Entra ID Conditional Access policies' and 'VPN access — all remote network access via VPN requires MFA through Duo', then has a dedicated 'Implementation Gap — On-Premises Active Directory (Legacy CAD Workstations)' section explicitly addressing local-access-to-privileged-account authentication on the AD domain.

expectations.text: Written in SSP style: describes what IS implemented (not aspirational), names responsible roles, and covers each assessment objective (who/what/where MFA is enforced)
expectations.evidence: Structured as an SSP practice entry table with 'Responsible Roles | System Administrator (Entra ID Conditional Access policy configuration and Duo VPN integration); ISSO (MFA policy compliance monitoring...)' and describes only currently-implemented coverage, explicitly noting 'The SSP entry above describes only the MFA coverage that is currently implemented.'

expectations.text: Identifies remaining gaps honestly and routes them to a POA&M entry rather than papering over (e.g., local admin access on legacy workstations pending smart card/Windows Hello deployment)
expectations.evidence: Full POA&M table provided: 'Weakness Description | MFA is not enforced for local or network logon to the on-premises Active Directory domain... Remediation Steps | Evaluate and deploy an MFA solution... (Duo Authentication Proxy with RADIUS, or Duo for Windows Logon/RDP) or federating on-prem AD with Entra ID Conditional Access', with explicit statement 'This gap is not described as implemented above and is not papered over.'

expectations.text: Includes evidence pointers an assessor would ask for (conditional access policy exports, Duo policy config, screenshots/logs demonstrating enforcement)
expectations.evidence: 'Evidence/Artifacts | Entra ID Conditional Access policy export showing MFA enforcement rules; Duo MFA enrollment and authentication logs for VPN sessions; MFA enrollment report...' plus POA&M 'Evidence of Closure | Updated Conditional Access / Duo Authentication Proxy configuration export; MFA enrollment report...; test authentication logs.'
